productDisplayName: Fila Men Green Fuel HI Shoes
description: This pair of green high top shoes from the Fuel-Hi range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and inkfruit tees and create a stir wherever you go.UpperGreen cotton canvas uppers with logo graphic on the heel for support and protectionWhite lace-ups for a snug FitLightly cushioned insole for greater comfortMidsoleLightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistanceOutsoleDurable rubber gum outsole with multi-directional gripfila branding on the heelToe guard for greater protectionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
